content.en:
Ye Tian disguised himself as an emperor-level fierce beast, flew for a distance, and finally came to a huge mountain.

As soon as he came here, a huge python with two heads rushed out and roared at Ye Tian: "Get out, this is my territory!"

Fierce beasts have a very strong sense of territory, and basically do not welcome foreign fierce beasts.

"Emperor-level fierce beast!"

Ye Tian judged the other party's cultivation and immediately exerted his spatial talent's spatial confinement ability.

Suddenly, the space froze.

And this emperor-level beast was like a statue, unable to move for half a minute.

It's too weak!

"Hypnosis!"

Ye Tian opened the hypnosis talent and hypnotized this emperor-level fierce beast.

Soon, Ye Tian had a general understanding of the situation in the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm from the other party's mouth.

This emperor-level fierce beast didn't know how huge the Ten Thousand Beast God Realm was, only that the area where it lived was controlled by a powerful god-level fierce beast.

That god-level beast is called the King Kong Giant Crocodile, and its strength is very powerful, and there are hundreds of god-level beasts under its command, and there are countless emperor-level beasts.

All the beasts must hand over a part of the offerings every once in a while, and once they can't, they will become the mouth of the King Kong giant crocodile.

In short, in this area, the King Kong giant crocodile is undoubtedly the absolute hegemon.

"Die!"

Ye Tian used the Soul Spear talent to erase the soul of this two-headed snake and kill it.

Immediately, Ye Tian occupied the lair of this two-headed snake and transformed it into his own mansion.

For a short time, he would stay here until he killed the King Kong Giant Crocodile, and then went to other areas to kill other god-level beasts.

"This two-headed snake is too weak, and he doesn't know the strength of the King Kong Giant Crocodile at all! If he knows the King Kong Giant Crocodile, it will be easy to do!" Ye Tian muttered.

God-level fierce beasts are the same as human god-level warriors, once they become god-level powerhouses, their physical strength cannot be improved, and what can be improved at this time is divine power and divine soul strength, but it is difficult to increase the strength of divine souls, so god-level powerhouses rely on cultivating divine power to improve their cultivation.

According to the strength of the divine power, it is divided into nine small realms from one to nine levels.

If you have just broken through to the god level, it is the first order of the god level, and once you cultivate to the ninth order of the god level, you will reach the peak realm of the god level.

The gap between the first order of the god level and the ninth order of the god level is like a world of difference.

Ye Tian had never fought against a powerhouse above the god-level, and it was difficult to judge his strength, but an ordinary god-level powerhouse was far from his opponent.

According to his estimates, even some weaker god-level ninth-order powerhouses were not Ye Tian's opponents.

But there are countless god-level fierce beasts in the Ten Thousand Beasts God Realm, and naturally there are many god-level fierce beasts with extremely powerful talents, which are not something he can defeat now.

In the next few days, Ye Tian continued to go out, looking for the lone emperor-level fierce beasts, and then capturing them, hypnotizing and torturing them for information.

Soon.

Ye Tian had a general understanding of the strength of the King Kong Giant Crocodile.

"God-level sixth-order god-level fierce beast!"

The god-level fierce beasts of this level are not very powerful, even if the talent is slightly better, Ye Tian is not afraid at all.

In short, as long as it wasn't a peerless Tianjiao who had achieved the sixth order of the god level, Ye Tian would not be afraid at all.

And with only 100 god-level fierce beasts, the King Kong giant crocodile can't be so rebellious, if all of them are so rebellious, he won't have to kill god-level fierce beasts, because it can't be done at all!

this day.

Ye Tian went to the old lair of the King Kong giant crocodile-King Kong Forest.

The King Kong Forest covers a very large area, and the vitality here is also very strong, and it is the most intense place in this area.

So the King Kong giant crocodile made this place his lair.

When Ye Tian came to the periphery of the King Kong Forest, he saw a large number of emperor-level fierce beasts.

These emperor-level fierce beasts are basically the subordinates of the King Kong Giant Crocodile, guarding the King Kong Forest for the King Kong Giant Crocodile.

Ye Tian's goal was to kill the god-level fierce beasts, and it was useless to kill the emperor-level fierce beasts.

Therefore, Ye Tian directly sneaked into the depths of the King Kong Forest in stealth.

Walk through the outskirts of the Vajra Forest and enter the depths of the Vajra Forest.

At this time, there were almost no emperor-level beasts in sight.

Suddenly, a white fox appeared in Ye Tian's sight.

This white fox also discovered Ye Tian, a pair of huge pupils stared at the invisible Ye Tian, and his eyes flashed with murderous intent.

Swish!

The white fox grabbed it with one claw, and the claw contained a strong divine power.

Obviously, it was a god-level beast.

Ye Tian knew that the top-level stealth talent was basically useless to the god-level powerhouse, because the god-level divine sense could penetrate the stealth talent.

So, he lifted the invisibility talent.

Facing the claw of the god-level fierce beast, Ye Tian teleported away very calmly.

Through this claw just now, Ye Tian preliminarily judged that the other party's cultivation should be at the third order of the god level.

Moreover, he also checked the talent of this white fox, the talent is average, and the most powerful is only the arcane talent.

Such a god-level beast is not powerful, it can be said to be a relatively weak god-level beast.

"Ten Thousand Realms!"

Ye Tianshi exhibited the Dacheng Realm's spatial divine power Ten Thousand Realms, which directly acted on the body of this white fox.

Bang!!!!

A heavy enchantment not only trapped the white fox, but also suppressed it under strong pressure.

"Space Collapse!"

In an instant, the area where the white fox was located directly collapsed, and its divine body directly shattered, turning into countless blood mist, dissipating in the shattered space.

"Too weak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He barely made any effort, and this god-level beast was killed by him.

And at the moment when the white fox died, a ball of white light flew into Ye Tian's wrist.

I saw an illusory light curtain appear on my wrist, and a number "1" appeared on it, and this 1 represented that Ye Tian had killed a god-level beast.

This watch was given to him by the Shentai Divine Master, and it was also a small thing made by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race, which could detect how many god-level beasts he had killed, and there was almost no way to cheat.

If Ye Tian wants to complete the task of the Supreme Hall of the Terran Race, he must increase the number above to 100,000, so as to obtain the reward of the Supreme Hall of the Terran - the Heavenly Dao Text of the Wood.

At this time, the death of this white fox attracted the attention of some god-level fierce beasts in the depths of the King Kong Forest, and one by one god-level fierce beasts flew over.

Ye Tian didn't take out the knife, this time he didn't plan to use the knife, just use the space magic power to deal with it.

After all, he is now disguised as a fierce beast, and if he uses a knife, his identity can be easily revealed.

Whew!!!

One after another, god-level fierce beasts appeared, and they surrounded Ye Tian one after another.

"The white fox is dead!"

A giant bear was shocked.

Suddenly, its gaze looked at Ye Tian: "You are just an emperor-level fierce beast, why did you appear here, who killed the white fox, say it quickly!"

Obviously, these god-level beasts thought that other god-level beasts had infiltrated and killed this white fox, and they didn't think that Ye Tian had killed the white fox.

Ye Tian is emperor-level, and the white fox is god-level, and it is a god-level third-order.

In the eyes of these god-level fierce beasts, no matter how strong the emperor-level fierce beast is, it is difficult to kill a god-level fierce beast, after all, the emperor-level breakthrough to the god-level, the divine body and divine power are a hundred times stronger than the emperor-level body and the yuan force!

In such a situation, it would be difficult for the emperor level to defeat a god-level fierce beast, let alone a god-level third-order fierce beast.

"I killed this fox!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

"You?"

All the god-level beasts stared at Ye Tian with a sneer, not believing it at all.

"Forget it, capture him, and hand him over to the boss!"

The Giant Bear spoke.

Then, it reached out and grabbed it, trying to catch Ye Tian.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian's body erupted with fluctuations of spatial supernatural powers, and countless spatial laws turned into huge idols and appeared.

Swish!

Ye Tian's body moved, and appeared beside the two god-level fierce beasts, and the huge void palm grabbed the two god-level fierce beasts at once, and with a slight pinch, the two god-level fierce beasts turned into countless fragments.

Puff puff!!!

A god-level fierce beast was easily killed by Ye Tian in an instant, and the other god-level fierce beasts were terrified!

They couldn't imagine that an emperor-level beast was so powerful, and the god-level beast was like cutting vegetables.

"Run!"

The bear roared.

Now, no god-level beast really regarded Ye Tian as an emperor-level beast.

Their hearts were filled with endless fear, if they didn't escape, they would definitely die, and all the god-level fierce beasts were not Ye Tian's opponents.

The gap between the two sides is too big!

However, they are destined to not escape!

"Ten Thousand Realms!"

Thousands of enchantments enveloped this area, and all the god-level fierce beasts were trapped in the Ten Thousand Realms Divine Power, and there was no way to break the enchantment and leave.

In the blink of an eye.

Most of the dozens of god-level beasts that arrived had already died, and there were only a dozen god-level beasts left.

At this moment, an angry roar came from the depths of the King Kong Forest.

"Who dares to come to my territory to make trouble?"

Thundered!!!!

The heavens and the earth change color, and the void shook.

I saw an ancient giant crocodile covered in silver and white flying over, and its huge body was like a small mountain range.

It is the owner of the King Kong Forest, the King Kong Giant Crocodile!

Behind the King Kong giant crocodile, there were a number of god-level fierce beasts, about fifty of them.

"The boss is out of the customs, we have hope of surviving!"

The remaining god-level beasts said happily.

It's a pity that before the King Kong giant crocodile arrived, Ye Tian killed the remaining god-level beasts at an extremely fast speed.

In the blink of an eye.

The King Kong Crocodile has arrived.

At this time, the King Kong giant crocodile stared at Ye Tian with great anger, and the rich killing intent rendered the sky.

It hates Ye Tian so much!

The god-level beast that Ye Tian killed just now was almost half of its subordinates!

"You're dead!"

The giant crocodile roared.
